recommendations.title: Zootopia 2

recommendations.title: The Great Train Robbery
recommendations.overview: After the train station clerk is assaulted and left bound and gagged, then the departing train and its passengers robbed, a posse goes in hot pursuit of the fleeing bandits.

recommendations.title: Barnyard
recommendations.overview: Otis is a mischievous, carefree Holstein cow who lives on a farm where, unbeknownst to humans, the animals are anthropomorphic. He prefers having fun with his best friends: Pip the mouse, Freddy the ferret, Peck the rooster, and Pig the pig - rather

recommendations.title: Friendly Beast

recommendations.title: Wheelman
recommendations.overview: A getaway driver for a bank robbery realizes he has been double crossed and races to find out who betrayed him.

recommendations.title: A Shock to the System
recommendations.overview: When experienced advertising executive Graham Marshall loses out on a promotion to a young man, he goes down in a path of vengeance.

recommendations.title: Crime Busters
recommendations.overview: An attempted robbery turns to be an unexpected recruitment when two unemployed men mistakenly break into a police office instead of a store.
